description:
Parent epic: V3 E12: Workflows

Source task 6/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Review whether workflow terminology needs simplification for beginners.

Epic closure criteria:
- workflows are deterministic and testable without model calls
- workflow-as-action execution is documented and verified

comments.text: Simplified beginner-facing workflow terminology: exposed workflows are now described as workflow operations/model-callable operations, public validation messages avoid workflow capability wording, and raw execution-graph terminology is kept out of user-facing docs.

title: E12: Review whether workflow terminology needs simplification for beginners
